loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing aggregate event counts for the last 7 days across all PRIMARY outgoing feeders. Per-member worst-case voltage/current deviation and imbalance values are aggregated from member meters; some members (UPS-05, UPS-06) have no data and are omitted from the worst-case rollup.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: AI narrative is generated from panel-aggregate event counts; per-phase voltage/current columns are not logged on this panel stub, so the narrative relies on aggregate sag/swell/neutral event totals.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-member event counts and worst deviations from PRIMARY feeders; GIC-02-N6-UPS-05 and GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 are dark (no data) and will render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current_avg per outgoing feeder; sag/swell/voltage metrics are not measured by this panel's aggregate table and are honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event frequency and voltage/current stats for the last 7 days. Solar Incomer-1 and Solar Incomer-2 have no live data (has_data=N) and will render as blanks.
